name: Smoked Ribbed Glass Warmer - Threshold™
description:
Make your space aromatic with the Smoked Ribbed Glass Warmer from Threshold™. Crafted from durable material, this electric warmer features a beautifully textured, ribbed glass design that complements a variety of decor styles. Powered by an incandescent bulb, it gently warms wax melts to release long-lasting fragrance without the need for an open flame. Ideal for bedrooms, living rooms or cozy corners, this warmer adds a subtle glow and inviting scent to your space, making it both a decorative accent and a visual treat.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you™
